creator: michael.osipov@siemens.com
text:
The Tomcat PMC has decided to retire Tomcat 7 next year: http://mail-archives.apache.org/mod_mbox/tomcat-dev/202003.mbox/%3C9da6e4a0-f414-2259-cbe9-641deb52010f%40apache.org%3E

Please add an appropriate notice for the port beginning 2020-04-01.

Affected ports need to be updated or removed:
devel/opengrok
devel/gitblit
www/axis2
www/madsonic
www/jspwiki
www/sakai
graphics/deegree-csw
graphics/deegree-igeoportal
graphics/deegree-wcs
graphics/deegree-wfs
graphics/deegree-wms
graphics/deegree-wps
graphics/deegree-wpvs
graphics/barbecue
